claims.claim: Israeli minimum wage effective 1 April 2026 is NIS 6,443.85 / 6,443.85 ש"ח per month and NIS 35.40 / 35.40 ש"ח per hour, raised from NIS 6,247.67 / 6,247.67 ש"ח.
claims.raw_snippet: החל מיום 01.04.2026 שכר המינימום הוא 6,443.85 ₪ לחודש למשרה מלאה ו-35.40 ₪ לשעה

claims.claim: Mandatory pension: employee 6.0% / 6%, employer 6.5% (of which about 0.5% disability insurance), plus a severance component. Severance (pitzuim) equals one month per year of service, about 8.33%. Section 14 (סעיף 14, Section 14) lets pension contributions count toward severance. Tech sector commonly offers 7% / 7.5% / 8%.
claims.raw_snippet: הפרשות העובד 6%, הפרשות המעסיק לתגמולים 6.5%, ולרכיב פיצויים לא פחות מ-6%

claims.claim: Keren Hishtalmut: employee 2.5%, employer 7.5%; 2026 tax-exempt monthly determining-salary ceiling NIS 15,712 / 15,712 ש"ח.
claims.raw_snippet: התקרה של משכורת חודשית קובעת היא 15,712 ₪ לשנת 2026, המעסיק עד 7.5% והעובד עד 2.5%

claims.claim: Convalescence pay (dmei havra'a) 2026 private-sector rate NIS 418 / 418 ש"ח per day (frozen from 2024-2025), public-sector about NIS 471.4 / 471.4 ש"ח per day. Sample annual amounts at 418: 5 days NIS 2,090 / 2,090 ש"ח, 6 days NIS 2,508 / 2,508 ש"ח, 7 days NIS 2,926 / 2,926 ש"ח, 8 days NIS 3,344, 9 days NIS 3,762, 10 days NIS 4,180.

Overtime: 125% for the first 2 hours, 150% thereafter; Shabbat/holiday work 150%. Sick pay: day 1 unpaid, days 2-3 at 50%, day 4 onward 100%; accrual 1.5 days/month up to 90 days. Travel expenses about NIS 22.60 / 22.60 ש"ח per day.

Worked example: a QA engineer at 18,000 NIS / NIS 18,000 / 18,000 ש"ח gross yields pension of 6% = 1,080 NIS / NIS 1,080 / 1,080 ש"ח (employee) and 6.5% = 1,170 NIS / NIS 1,170 / 1,170 ש"ח (employer). The Equal Employment Opportunities Law 1988 (Section 2 / סעיף 2 protected characteristics; Section 9 burden of proof) allows punitive damages up to NIS 120,000 without proof of harm.
claims.raw_snippet: פיצויים ללא הוכחת נזק עד 120,000 ש"ח, חוק שוויון ההזדמנויות בעבודה, התשמ"ח-1988, סעיף 2

claims.claim: Reference URLs used by the skill.
